data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for JSON payload flexibility without one-off tables per plugin.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for JSON payload flexibility, but the provided evidence does not include any checks or details regarding this specific requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for JSON payload flexibility, yet there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks presented that confirm or deny this requirement. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a definitive conclusion regarding the requirement's satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of JSON payload flexibility without one-off tables per plugin.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the JSON payload flexibility requirement.
